agents.name: N04 Embedding Engineer — Vector Pipeline Specialist
agents.domain: embeddings, vector stores, chunking, similarity search, pgvector, dimensionality
capabilities: Embedding Model Selection (OpenAI, Voyage, local SBERT)
Chunk Strategy Design (fixed-window, semantic, sentence-split, code-block)
Vector Store Configuration (Supabase pgvector, FAISS, ChromaDB)
Index Tuning (IVFFlat vs HNSW, probe count, ef_construction)
Batch Embedding Processing (bulk inserts, rate limiting)
Dimensionality Analysis (model dims → storage cost → latency tradeoff)
Hybrid Search Setup (dense + sparse + RRF fusion)
agents.description: N04 Embedding Engineer — Vector Pipeline Specialist

agents.name: N04 Ingestion Engineer — Source Acquisition Specialist
agents.domain: web crawling, content extraction, document loading, source management, freshness
capabilities: Web Crawling (firecrawl MCP — bulk site ingestion)
HTTP Fetch (fetch MCP — single page/API retrieval)
Document Loading (PDF, HTML, CSV, JSON, YAML, Markdown)
Source Registry Management (rag_source creation and refresh scheduling)
Content Cleaning (strip boilerplate, normalize encoding, extract main body)
Format Normalization (raw → structured Markdown with frontmatter)
agents.description: N04 Ingestion Engineer — Source Acquisition Specialist

agents.name: N04 Knowledge Engineer — Knowledge Gluttony
agents.domain: knowledge management, KC lifecycle, database layer, fine-tuning prep, ML datasets, taxonomy, embedding, Supabase
capabilities: KC Lifecycle Management (create, update, archive, deprecate)
agents.description: N04 Knowledge Engineer — Knowledge Gluttony

agents.name: N04 Taxonomy Engineer — Classification Specialist
agents.domain: taxonomy, classification, kind registry, pillar mapping, tag normalization
capabilities: Schema-to-Kind Alignment (validate artifact frontmatter vs schema)
Gap Detection (missing kinds, empty pillar branches)
Domain Boundary Enforcement (routing rules between nuclei)
agents.description: N04 Taxonomy Engineer — Classification Specialist

agents.name: Nucleus Def N00
agents.description: N00 is the archetype: 12 pillar schemas + kinds registry + golden examples. Not spawnable.

agents.name: Nucleus Def N01
agents.description: N01 is the research nucleus: knowledge_cards, market analysis, papers, benchmarks. Claude Sonnet 200K.

agents.name: Nucleus Def N02
agents.description: N02 is the marketing nucleus: ad copy, taglines, landing pages, brand voice.

agents.name: Nucleus Def N03
agents.description: N03 is the builder nucleus: constructs all CEX artifacts via 8F. Claude Opus 1M context.

agents.name: Nucleus Def N04
agents.description: N04 is the knowledge nucleus: RAG, KCs, embeddings, taxonomy, retrieval. Also owns capability_registry (P08).

agents.name: Nucleus Def N05
agents.description: N05 is the operations nucleus: tests, deploys, CI/CD, quality gates, tools. Owns nucleus_def authoring.

agents.name: Nucleus Def N06
agents.description: N06 is the commercial nucleus: pricing, courses, funnels, CLV. Also owns team_charter (P12 GOVERN).

agents.name: Nucleus Def N07
agents.description: N07 is the orchestrator: dispatches nuclei, assembles crews, consolidates waves. Claude Opus 1M context.
